commands.review_summary:
The PR makes Codex app-server approval reviewer selection provider-aware for local/custom models and adds an SDK-backed internal exec auto-review path for app-server command approvals.

PR surface: Source +453, Tests +868, Generated 0. Total +1321 across 17 files.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: current main forces tools.exec.mode=auto toward Codex model-backed approval review without carrying local/custom provider context into app-server policy resolution.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] This needs maintainer/owner acceptance of the compatibility and approval-boundary tradeoff, not an autonomous repair job from the current evidence.

target.title: fix(codex): avoid guardian review for local models
target.body:
## Summary
- Downgrade Codex app-server Guardian/model-backed approval reviewers to user approvals for non-Codex/OpenAI providers and provider-qualified local model refs.
- Route local-model app-server command approvals through OpenClaw internal exec auto-review only for `tools.exec.mode=auto` with an explicit `tools.exec.reviewer.model` under `openai/...`; otherwise fall back to plugin/human approval.
- Keep code-mode side forks and bound conversation turns from pairing local-model user reviewers with stale no-approval policy; bound conversations fail closed when interactive approvals cannot be routed.
- Refresh the Plugin SDK API baseline for the new exec auto-review contract and keep current-main lint cleanup green.

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: local/custom model Codex app-server auto approval no longer tries to use Codex Guardian/model-backed review, and internal exec auto-review requires an explicitly OpenAI-qualified reviewer model.
Real environment tested: local focused Vitest in the Codex worktree plus delegated Blacksmith Testbox changed gate.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/codex/src/app-server/app-server-policy.test.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/config.test.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.test.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/side-question.test.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/approval-bridge.test.ts extensions/codex/src/conversation-binding.test.ts src/channels/message/ingress-queue.test.ts`; `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`; `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider blacksmith-testbox --shell -- "set -euo pipefail; env OPENCLAW_CHECK_CHANGED_REMOTE_CHILD=1 OPENCLAW_CHANGED_LANES_RAW_SYNC=1 CI=true corepack pnpm check:changed"`.
Evidence after fix: focused Vitest passed 2 shards, 286 tests total; autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings; Testbox `tbx_01kt04w02ntab0jrnqwrhvzmpt` passed `check:changed` with exit 0.
Observed result after fix: policy, config, side-question, run-attempt, conversation-binding, approval-bridge, and ingress queue regressions pass; changed-gate typecheck/lint/guards pass on the rebased branch.
What was not tested: live LM Studio/Ollama app-server round trip was not run; coverage is via policy/bridge regression tests and the changed gate.
target.author: vincentkoc
